CX DevKit
Table of Contents

Namespace CXEX.Lang.Sema

Classes

ConstFold

Compile-time constant evaluation for X core v0.1: integer/bool literals, the arithmetic/comparison/logical operators, unary neg/not, casts (value-preserving), and references to other consts. Used for const initializers, global initializers, and array lengths. Returns false (with a diagnostic) for anything not constant.

Resolver

Pass 1: collect top-level declarations, then resolve every name to a symbol, tracking lexical scopes for params/locals. Reports duplicates + undefined names.

Scope

Lexical scope chain. Globals live at the root; functions push a child.

SemaContext

Shared semantic state produced by the Resolver and consumed by the TypeChecker: top-level symbols, struct decls by name, and per-NameExpr resolution.

Symbol
TypeChecker

Pass 2: assign a type to every expression and check statements. v0.1 is deliberately lenient on integer width (any int coerces to any int) so the language is usable before a full numeric-conversion policy exists; pointers, bools, structs, and arrays are checked strictly. Records each expr's type in ctx.Types for CodeGen. The __syscall intrinsic is the one effect primitive.

Enums

SymKind
Made with docfx
